title: Polish Frittata
description: A keto-friendly twist on a Polish classic, this frittata combines flavors from Eastern Europe with the richness of cheese.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup grated cheese
ingredients.notes: Polish cheese or cheddar work well

instructions: In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add diced pull and cook until browned, breaking up with a spoon as needed.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs and grated cheese.
Pour egg mixture over cooked onion and pull mixture in skillet.
Transfer skillet to preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until eggs are set.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Slice into wedges and serve hot.
